name: Specimen Grid
description: Auto-fill grid of design specimens — atom previews, icon tiles, color swatches. Each cell shows a labeled visual sample. Supports presets for different layouts.

swatch.name: Swatch
swatch.description: Default auto-fill grid of equal-sized specimen cells. Ideal for token/icon/color grids.

slots.specimen-card: Individual specimen cell with preview area + name label + optional value
slots.filter-bar: Optional filter Input at top to narrow visible specimens

preview.name: Preview
preview.description: Full-width rows with larger specimens and hover expand. Designed for creative tool previews — palette strips, gradient rows, etc.

slots.specimen-row: Full-width row showing a connected strip of specimen cells (e.g. 5-color palette)
slots.specimen-cell: Individual specimen within a row, with pillow shadow and hover expand
slots.filter-bar: Optional filter/input bar above the grid
